rationale: The skill detects installed AI SDKs by grepping package.json/requirements.txt/pyproject.toml, then writes Sentry init configuration into source files like sentry.edge.config.ts or Python entry points. It may consult docs.sentry.io to verify current SDK versions and APIs. Configuration changes typically require installing/upgrading the Sentry SDK via npm or pip, and the configured app ultimately reports to Sentry's ingest endpoints.
